=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/functionToArrow.ts ---
// refactor: 5:20-5:25, 12:20-12:25, 21:5-21:9
/**
 * Docs
 */
export function myTpipe(est(n)ame: string) {
  return name.length
}

/**
 * Docs
 */
export function myTest2(name: string) {
  if (name === "LOL") return 42
  return name.length
}

class Sample {
  /**
   * Docs
   */
  test(name: string) {
    return name.length
  }
}


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Toggle return type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/functionToArrow.ts ---
// refactor: 5:20-5:25, 12:20-12:25, 21:5-21:9
/**
 * Docs
 */
export function myTest(name: string): number {
  return name.length
}

/**
 * Docs
 */
export function myTest2(name: string) {
  if (name === "LOL") return 42
  return name.length
}

class Sample {
  /**
   * Docs
   */
  test(name: string) {
    return name.length
  }
}


=== [R1] Refactor 2: "Convert to arrow" ===

--- file:///.src/functionToArrow.ts ---
// refactor: 5:20-5:25, 12:20-12:25, 21:5-21:9
/**
 * Docs
 */
export const myTest = (name: string) => name.length;

/**
 * Docs
 */
export function myTest2(name: string) {
  if (name === "LOL") return 42
  return name.length
}

class Sample {
  /**
   * Docs
   */
  test(name: string) {
    return name.length
  }
}


=== [R2] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/functionToArrow.ts ---
// refactor: 5:20-5:25, 12:20-12:25, 21:5-21:9
/**
 * Docs
 */
export function myTest(name: string) {
  return name.length
}

/**
 * Docs
 */
export function myTpipe(est2()name: string) {
  if (name === "LOL") return 42
  return name.length
}

class Sample {
  /**
   * Docs
   */
  test(name: string) {
    return name.length
  }
}


=== [R2] Refactor 1: "Toggle return type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/functionToArrow.ts ---
// refactor: 5:20-5:25, 12:20-12:25, 21:5-21:9
/**
 * Docs
 */
export function myTest(name: string) {
  return name.length
}

/**
 * Docs
 */
export function myTest2(name: string): number {
  if (name === "LOL") return 42
  return name.length
}

class Sample {
  /**
   * Docs
   */
  test(name: string) {
    return name.length
  }
}


=== [R2] Refactor 2: "Convert to arrow" ===

--- file:///.src/functionToArrow.ts ---
// refactor: 5:20-5:25, 12:20-12:25, 21:5-21:9
/**
 * Docs
 */
export function myTest(name: string) {
  return name.length
}

/**
 * Docs
 */
export const myTest2 = (name: string) => {
    if (name === "LOL") return 42;
    return name.length;
};

class Sample {
  /**
   * Docs
   */
  test(name: string) {
    return name.length
  }
}


=== [R3] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/functionToArrow.ts ---
// refactor: 5:20-5:25, 12:20-12:25, 21:5-21:9
/**
 * Docs
 */
export function myTest(name: string) {
  return name.length
}

/**
 * Docs
 */
export function myTest2(name: string) {
  if (name === "LOL") return 42
  return name.length
}

class Sample {
  /**
   * Docs
   */
  tepipe(st(n)ame: string) {
    return name.length
  }
}


=== [R3] Refactor 1: "Toggle return type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/functionToArrow.ts ---
// refactor: 5:20-5:25, 12:20-12:25, 21:5-21:9
/**
 * Docs
 */
export function myTest(name: string) {
  return name.length
}

/**
 * Docs
 */
export function myTest2(name: string) {
  if (name === "LOL") return 42
  return name.length
}

class Sample {
  /**
   * Docs
   */
  test(name: string): number {
    return name.length
  }
}


=== [R3] Refactor 2: "Convert to arrow" ===

--- file:///.src/functionToArrow.ts ---
// refactor: 5:20-5:25, 12:20-12:25, 21:5-21:9
/**
 * Docs
 */
export function myTest(name: string) {
  return name.length
}

/**
 * Docs
 */
export function myTest2(name: string) {
  if (name === "LOL") return 42
  return name.length
}

class Sample {
  /**
   * Docs
   */
  test = (name: string) => name.length;
}
